# @nordic/assets-config

Nordic assets config utilities.

## ✋ Internal Package

> [!WARNING]
>
> This is an **internal package** to the [Nordic monorepo](https://github.com/melisource/fury_nordic) ✋. You likely don't need to use it directly.

## Table of Contents

- [@nordic/assets-config](#nordicassets-config)
  - [✋ Internal Package](#-internal-package)
  - [Table of Contents](#table-of-contents)
  - [API](#api)
    - [getAssetsCDN / getAssetsPrefix](#getassetscdn--getassetsprefix)

## API

### getAssetsCDN / getAssetsPrefix

Standalone functions for resolving CDN and asset prefix values per request or during bundling.

| Function            | Return   | Description                                                                                                                                    |
| ------------------- | -------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `getAssetsCDN()`    | `string` | Returns the CDN base URL resolved from `frontend-config` per request, falling back to `https://http2.mlstatic.com`                             |
| `getAssetsPrefix()` | `string` | Returns the asset path prefix. In development returns `/`. In production uses `config.assets.prefix` or `{cdn}/frontend-assets/{APPLICATION}/` |
